recommendations.title: The Lighthouse of the Orcas
recommendations.overview: A mother travels to Patagonia with her autistic son with the hope that a ranger and a pod of wild orcas can help him find an emotional connection.

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: The In Between
recommendations.overview: After surviving a car accident that took the life of her boyfriend, a teenage girl believes he's attempting to reconnect with her from the after world.

recommendations.title: Pillion
recommendations.overview: Colin, a timid gay man, is swept off his feet when Ray, an enigmatic and impossibly handsome biker, takes him on as his submissive in a crazy and erotic BDSM-focused relationship.

recommendations.title: Flicka 2
recommendations.overview: Carrie is a big-city teenager whose life is turned upside down when she moves to a horse ranch in Wyoming to live with her father. But everything changes when Carrie meets Flicka, a wild, jet-black mustang who's just as free-spirited and strong-wille

recommendations.title: Disquiet
recommendations.overview: After a near-fatal car accident, Sam wakes to discover he is trapped in an abandoned hospital by mysterious and sinister forces that have no intention of letting him leave…

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Patients
recommendations.overview: After a serious sport accident in a swimming pool, Ben, now an incomplete quadriplegic, arrives in a rehabilitation center. He meets with other handicapped persons (tetraplegics, paraplegics, traumatized crania), all victims of accidents, as well as

recommendations.title: Bleed for This
recommendations.overview: The inspirational story of World Champion Boxer Vinny Pazienza, who after a near fatal car crash, which left him not knowing if he'd ever walk again, made one of sports most incredible comebacks.

recommendations.title: The I Inside
